name: framework-migration-code-migrate
description: You are a code migration expert specializing in transitioning codebases between frameworks, languages, versions, and platforms. Generate comprehensive migration plans, automated migration scripts, and
capabilities: Analyze source codebases to assess migration complexity and identify risks
Generate phased migration plans with timelines and resource estimates
Create automated transformation scripts for code conversions
Provide framework-specific migration patterns (React to Vue, Python 2 to 3, etc.)
Design testing strategies to validate migrated code functionality
Develop rollback procedures for safe migration reversal
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a documentation/guide skill containing code examples for framework migration. All detected patterns (external_commands, network, filesystem) are FALSE POSITIVES - they are code samples within markdown documentation, not executable code. The skill provides guidance for migrating codebases and contains no actual security risks.
valueStatement: This skill helps developers migrate codebases between frameworks, languages, and platforms by generating comprehensive migration plans, automated transformation scripts, and detailed migration strategies with testing and rollback support.
limitations: Does not execute actual code transformations - provides guidance and templates only
May require manual review for complex business logic migrations
Cannot guarantee 100% automated migration - some manual intervention expected
Does not have access to external tools or databases for real migration execution

useCases.title: Legacy System Modernization
useCases.description: Migrate old Python 2 applications to Python 3 with automated code transformation patterns and testing strategies.

useCases.title: Frontend Framework Migration
useCases.description: Convert React components to Vue.js or other frameworks using automated component transformation scripts.

useCases.title: Database Schema Migration
useCases.description: Transform SQL database schemas to NoSQL document structures with proper data mapping and migration scripts.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Migration Request
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me migrate my [language/framework] codebase from [source_version/platform] to [target_version/platform]. The codebase has approximately [number] files. What is the recommended migration strategy and timeline?

promptTemplates.title: Framework Migration Plan
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a detailed migration plan to convert my [React/Vue/Angular] application to [Vue/React/Svelte]. Include phases, estimated effort, risk assessment, and testing strategy.

promptTemplates.title: Code Transformation Script
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate Python code to transform [specific code pattern, e.g., print statements] from [old format] to [new format]. Include error handling and edge case handling.

promptTemplates.title: Database Migration Strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a migration strategy to move from [SQL database] to [NoSQL database]. Include schema mapping, data transformation rules, and validation testing approach.

bestPractices: Always run the skill on a copy of the codebase before applying changes to production
Use the phased migration approach for large projects to minimize risk
Implement comprehensive testing before and after each migration phase
Maintain rollback procedures and keep the original codebase accessible until full validation
antiPatterns: Attempting full automated migration without manual review of generated code
Skipping the risk assessment phase and jumping directly to code transformation
Migrating all components at once instead of using incremental migration
Ignoring testing and jumping straight to production deployment

faq.question: Does this skill execute actual code migration?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates migration plans, scripts, and transformation code templates. It provides guidance and example code that you review and execute manually.

faq.question: Can it migrate any programming language?
faq.answer: The skill provides patterns for common migrations like Python 2 to 3, JavaScript frameworks, and database migrations. For less common languages, it provides general migration methodology.

faq.question: How accurate are the automated transformation scripts?
faq.answer: Transformation scripts handle common patterns but may require manual adjustment for complex business logic, custom abstractions, or edge cases.

faq.question: Does this work with Claude Code and Codex?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is designed to work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code AI assistants for code migration tasks.

faq.question: Can I use this for production migrations?
faq.answer: Yes, but always test on a staging environment first. Review all generated code before applying to production systems.

faq.question: What happens if migration fails?
faq.answer: The skill includes rollback planning to help you revert to the original state if migration encounters critical issues.
